metadata.description: Synthetic telemetry for B2B sales pipeline Markov chain modelling. Each event is one node visit. Use (employee_id, deal_id) to reconstruct sequences. next_node field encodes the observed transition.

schema.timestamp: Wall-clock start time of the node visit (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
schema.deal_id: Ties events to a single deal thread for sequence reconstruction
schema.outcome: completed | closed_won | lost | disqualified | no_response | retry
schema.next_node: Observed successor node — key input for transition matrix
schema.repeated_node: True if this visit is a retry of the same node in the same deal
